alerts.header: Metro-North is operating on a Saturday schedule with enhanced service on the New Haven Line. Waterbury service is replaced by bus.
alerts.text:
Off-peak fares are in effect all day.

Crews have been working around the clock to clear Metro-North Railroad’s system of snow and ice in preparation for this increased service.

Still, we recommend you use caution when traveling, as surfaces may be slippery. Hold on to handrails when using stairs and be careful when boarding or exiting trains and buses.

alerts.header: Metro-North is operating on a Saturday schedule with enhanced service on the Hudson Line.
alerts.text:
Off-peak fares are in effect all day.

Haverstraw-Ossining Ferry’s substitute bus service resumes operation. View the special bus schedule for today here.

The Hudson Rail Link also resumes operation. View the special schedule for today for Riverdale here and for Spuyten Duyvil here.

Crews have been working around the clock to clear Metro-North Railroad’s system of snow and ice in preparation for this increased service.

Still, we recommend you use caution when traveling, as surfaces may be slippery. Hold on to handrails when using stairs and be careful when boarding or exiting trains and buses.
